testcase.name: test_chat_returns_reply
testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:71: in test_chat_returns_reply assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Failed to start streaming completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
